change_log.summary: Mapped legacy documentation data into the canonical schema; no clinical approval claimed.
Removed preconfirmed content and applied deterministic safety/consistency fixes; clinical review remains required.
Independent final automated audit completed; no clinical approval claimed.

unresolved_issues.summary: No workflow-specific authoritative source was verified in the automated registry mapping.
54 prompts use generic “relevant to … if assessed” wording; condition-specific clinical review is required.

local_adaptation_notes: No guideline recommendation is converted into a patient-specific action.
